classes.reasoning: This is a published peer-reviewed journal article from 'Biomed Pap Med Fac Univ Palacky Olomouc Czech Repub. 2020 Mar; 164(1):43-48' with a DOI (https://doi.org/10.5507/bp.2019.048), authored by academic researchers, and structured as a scientific review article with abstract, introduction, references, and acknowledgements.

summary: This is a peer-reviewed scientific review article published in March 2020 in a Czech medical journal. It provides a comprehensive overview of the role of tumor infiltrating lymphocytes (TILs) in malignant melanoma, discussing their prognostic value, immunological heterogeneity, regulatory mechanisms, and implications for targeted immunotherapy.
references_to: Gene expression analysis of melanomas with brisk TIL grade
